mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user
AND (username LIKE CONCAT('%',#{keyword},'%') OR nickname LIKE CONCAT('%',#{keyword},'%'))
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user(username, password, nickname, avatar, gender, birthday, height, target_weight, phone, status) VALUES(#{username}, #{password}, #{nickname}, #{avatar}, #{gender}, #{birthday}, #{height}, #{targetWeight}, #{phone}, #{status})
mapper.select: SELECT CASE gender WHEN 1 THEN '男' WHEN 2 THEN '女' ELSE '未知' END AS name, COUNT(*) AS value FROM user GROUP BY gender
